sentences.target: Der Alarm weckt mich jeden Morgen.

translations.de: Der Alarm weckt mich jeden Morgen.
translations.en: The alarm wakes me every morning.
translations.es: La alarma me despierta todas las mañanas.
translations.it: La sveglia mi sveglia tutte le mattine.
translations.pt: O despertador me acorda todas as manhãs.
translations.he: השעון המעורר מעיר אותי כל בוקר.
translations.vi: Chuông báo thức đánh thức tôi mỗi sáng.
translations.nl: De wekker maakt me elke ochtend wakker.
translations.hi: अलार्म मुझे हर सुबह जगा देता है.
translations.el: Το ξυπνητήρι με ξυπνά κάθε πρωί.
translations.ro: Alarma mă trezește în fiecare dimineață.
translations.ja: アラームは毎朝私を起こす。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular marking the subject noun.
Nominative singular common noun; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; direct object of the verb.
Determiner in accusative masculine singular modifying 'Morgen' to form a temporal accusative phrase.
Common noun in accusative singular functioning as a temporal adverbial ('jeden Morgen').

sentences.target: Ich stelle den Alarm auf sieben.

translations.de: Ich stelle den Alarm auf sieben.
translations.en: I'm setting the alarm to seven.
translations.es: Voy a poner la alarma a las siete.
translations.fr: Je mets l’alarme à sept heures.
translations.pt: Vou colocar o alarme para as sete.
translations.he: אני מכוון את השעון המעורר לשבע.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt báo thức lúc bảy giờ.
translations.nl: Ik zet de wekker op zeven uur.
translations.hi: मैं अलार्म सात बजे के लिए सेट कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg setter alarmen til klokka sju.
translations.id: Saya menyetel alarm ke pukul tujuh.
translations.da: Jeg sætter alarmen til klokken syv.
translations.ja: アラームを7時にセットする。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive.
Definite article in accusative masculine singular marking the direct object noun.
Accusative singular common noun; direct object of 'stelle'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the prepositional complement specifying target/time.
Cardinal numeral functioning as the head of the NP after 'auf' (accusative), indicating the target time.

sentences.target: Der Rauchmelder schlägt Alarm wegen des Rauchs.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ ˈʁaʊxˌmɛldɐ ʃlɛːkt aˈlaʁm ˈveːɡn̩ dɛs ʁaʊxs/

translations.de: Der Rauchmelder schlägt Alarm wegen des Rauchs.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ ˈʁaʊxˌmɛldɐ ʃlɛːkt aˈlaʁm ˈveːɡn̩ dɛs ʁaʊxs/
translations.en: The smoke detector sounds the alarm because of smoke.
translations.es: El detector de humo se dispara por el humo.
translations.fr: Le détecteur de fumée se déclenche à cause de la fumée.
translations.it: Il rilevatore di fumo si attiva a causa del fumo.
translations.zh-Hans: 因为有烟，烟雾报警器响了。
translations.yue: 因為有煙，煙霧警報器響咗。
translations.pt: O detector de fumaça dispara por causa da fumaça.
translations.tr: Duman yüzünden duman dedektörü alarm veriyor.
translations.vi: Máy báo khói kêu vì có khói.
translations.ar: كاشف الدخان يطلق الإنذار بسبب الدخان.
translations.nl: De rookmelder gaat af door de rook.
translations.hu: A füstérzékelő a füst miatt riaszt.
translations.hi: धुएँ के कारण धुएँ का अलार्म बज उठता है.
translations.pl: Czujnik dymu uruchamia się z powodu dymu.
translations.el: Ο ανιχνευτής καπνού ενεργοποιείται λόγω του καπνού.
translations.nb: Røykvarsleren går av på grunn av røyken.
translations.sv: Brandvarnaren larmar på grund av rök.
translations.ro: Detectorul de fum se declanșează din cauza fumului.
translations.cs: Detektor kouře se spustí kvůli kouři.
translations.da: Røgalarmen går i gang på grund af røg.
translations.ja: 煙のせいで火災報知器が鳴る。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular marking the subject noun.
Compound common noun in nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; in the idiomatic construction 'Alarm schlagen'.
Accusative singular common noun; direct object in the idiom 'Alarm schlagen'.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces a causal PP.
Definite article in genitive masculine singular marking the NP following 'wegen'.
Common noun in genitive singular; object of the preposition 'wegen'.

sentences.target: Draußen geht der Alarm plötzlich los.

translations.de: Draußen geht der Alarm plötzlich los.
translations.en: Outside, the alarm suddenly goes off.
translations.es: Afuera la alarma se dispara de repente.
translations.pt: Lá fora, o alarme dispara de repente.
translations.vi: Ở bên ngoài, chuông báo động bất ngờ kêu lên.
translations.nl: Buiten gaat het alarm ineens af.
translations.hi: बाहर अचानक अलार्म बजने लगता है.
translations.pl: Na zewnątrz alarm nagle się włącza.
translations.da: Udenfor går alarmen pludselig i gang.
translations.ja: 外でアラームが突然鳴り出す。

tokens.explanation: Sentential adverb setting the scene/location.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; part of the separable verb 'losgehen' (to go off).

Separable particle of the verb 'losgehen', realized clause-final; linked with 'geht' via compound_id.

Ich stelle den Alarm auf sieben.
Der Rauchmelder schlägt Alarm wegen des Rauchs.
Draußen geht der Alarm plötzlich los.

en: The alarm wakes me every morning.
I'm setting the alarm to seven.
The smoke detector sounds the alarm because of smoke.
Outside, the alarm suddenly goes off.
